message:
chore: bump version to 1.0.3

Version bump for all workspace crates and installer script:
- rch: 1.0.2 → 1.0.3
- rch-common: 1.0.2 → 1.0.3
- rch-telemetry: 1.0.2 → 1.0.3
- rch-wkr: 1.0.2 → 1.0.3
- rchd: 1.0.2 → 1.0.3
- install.sh INSTALLER_VERSION: 1.0.2 → 1.0.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3036,7 +3036,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch"
-version = "1.0.2"
+version = "1.0.3"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -3088,7 +3088,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-common"
-version = "1.0.2"
+version = "1.0.3"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -3123,7 +3123,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-telemetry"
-version = "1.0.2"
+version = "1.0.3"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "chrono",
@@ -3144,7 +3144,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-wkr"
-version = "1.0.2"
+version = "1.0.3"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -3162,7 +3162,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rchd"
-version = "1.0.2"
+version = "1.0.3"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "axum",

@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ members = [
 ]
 
 [workspace.package]
-version = "1.0.2"
+version = "1.0.3"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 authors = ["Remote Compilation Helper Contributors"]

@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ set -euo pipefail
 # Configuration
 # ============================================================================
 
-INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.2"
+INSTALLER_VERSION="1.0.3"
 VERSION=""  # Set dynamically based on install mode
 REPO_URL="https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
 GITHUB_REPO="Dicklesworthstone/remote_compilation_helper"
